incidents.portal.successDesc: Your report has been received and will be reviewed by the organizers. Thank you for helping maintain a safe environment.
incidents.portal.bannerDesc: Your report is encrypted and handled with extreme care by our safety committee. Your well-being and privacy are our absolute priority.
incidents.portal.formDesc: Provide as much detail as possible. This information helps us maintain a professional, inclusive, and safe environment for all hackathon participants.
incidents.portal.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the incident in detail... Include dates, times, and specific actions.
incidents.portal.severity.low.label: Low
incidents.portal.severity.medium.label: Medium
incidents.portal.severity.high.label: High
incidents.portal.severity.critical.label: Critical
incidents.portal.anonymousDesc: Your name will not be shared with the reported party.
incidents.portal.confirmLead: Your report will be submitted to the safety committee.
incidents.portal.confirmAnonymous: This report will be filed anonymously.
incidents.portal.page.label: Safety
incidents.portal.page.title: Incident Report
